zh.Pitminster, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特比特明斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Hankeford於1379年出生在英國戴文可洛福利時，她的父親Sir William Hankford30歲，母親Christina45歲。她於大約1405年與Robert Kirkham在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年12月4日在英國薩默塞特霍爾瓦享年70歲。

zh-hans.Pitminster, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特比特明斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Hankeford于1379年出生在英国戴文可洛福利时，她的父亲Sir William Hankford30岁，母亲Christina45岁。她于大约1405年与Robert Kirkham在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年12月4日在英国薩默塞特霍爾瓦享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Hankeford was born in 1379, in Clovelly, Devon, England, her father, Sir William Hankford, was 30 and her mother, Christina, was 45. She married Robert Kirkham about 1405, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 4 December 1449, in Holway, Somerset, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Hankeford est née en 1379, à Clovelly, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Hankford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Christina, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Kirkham environ 1405, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 décembre 1449, à Holway, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Hankeford 1379 in Clovelly, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Hankford 30 und ihre Mutter Christina 45. Sie hat um 1405 in England Robert Kirkham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Dezember 1449 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Holway, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Hankeford è nata il nel 1379 nel Clovelly, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir William Hankford, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Christina, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Robert Kirkham circa 1405, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 dicembre 1449, nel Holway, Somerset, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Hankefordが1379年にイギリスデボンクロベリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Hankfordは30歳，母Christinaは45歳であった。約1405年にイギリスでRobert Kirkhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年12月4日にイギリスソメルセトホールワイで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Hankeford(이)가 1379년 영국 데폰 클로브리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Hankford(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christina(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 대략 1405년 영국에서 Robert Kirkham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 12월 4일 영국 서머세트 홀웨이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Merton, Devon, England: Merton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Hankeford nasceu em 1379, em Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Hankford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Christina, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Kirkham aproximadamente 1405, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1449, em Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Hankeford родилась в 1379 г. в местности клавелли, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Hankford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Kirkham около 1405 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 декабря 1449 г. в местности холвеи, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Hankeford nació en 1379, en Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Hankford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Christina, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Robert Kirkham aproximadamente 1405, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1449, en Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
